TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: aring rmuruw "2030 rusa' ulah ke' na koka" (2030雙語國家) qu sexu. nyux nha ptnaqun rmuruw qu ke' yung ki ke' ego. ana ga, skahul ta' lmagu' kinlokh musa' pspung te cinbwanan qani ga, iyat nanak rmuruw tqbaq ke' ego qani qu pcyogun ta'. ryax 8 qani ga, 臺灣語文學會splahuy nha' sinbung kisya mwah kmayal nqu " hmtuy yow nqu 2030 rusa' ulah ke' na koka ". lokah balay mplaw kmayal muci, piyux balay ini' btnaq ke' nyux maki te Taywan, yan na ke' na Austronesia , ke' na Plmukan , ke' na qba' Taywan . kora' qani ga siy say pzyang kinblaq na hbangan ke' Taywan, laxi balay scipuq mita' qu yow qani. squliuq ka pzyang balay baq kinbaqan kmayal muci uzi. iyat muci laxi tqbaq ke' ego, yana sexu ga, aki mblaq lmnglung ke' na koka, aki son nanu' siqa thuyay m'hbangan na cinbwanan maki te Taywan qani. aki mwah slabang ru sbhuyaw mnanak na ke', rekisi, gaga' ru ngengayan na Taywan. lmagu' sa kinlokah ka musa' pspung te cinbwanan. mwah pcbaq kmayal muci lozi, yow na pcyogun rmuruw ke' qani ga, pzyang balay na yow. ini' tnaqi mita' qu pinnraw lga, musa' mwah psyaqih balay yow na lmuhuw ke' koka ta qani la. gmbang ke' gmbang ke': 陳麗惠/Yaway Walis "南投縣仁愛鄉Mstbwan部落之地方語音"
S.PHON: ariŋ rmuruw "**** rus~ɕaʔ ulaħ keʔ na koka" (********) qu s~ɕexu. njux nħa ptnaqun rmuruw qu keʔ juŋ ki keʔ eɣo. ana ɣa, s~ɕkaħul taʔ lmaɣuʔ kinlokħ mus~ɕaʔ ps~ɕpuŋ te ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa, ijat nanak rmuruw tqβaq keʔ eɣo qani qu pʦ~ʨjoɣun taʔ. rjax * qani ɣa, ******s~ɕplaħuj nħaʔ s~ɕinβuŋ kis~ɕja mwaħ kmajal nqu " ħmtuj jow nqu **** rus~ɕaʔ ulaħ keʔ na koka ". lokaħ βalaj mplaw kmajal muʦ~ʨi, pijux βalaj iniʔ βtnaq keʔ njux maki te tajwan, jan na keʔ na aus~ɕtrones~ɕia , keʔ na plmukan , keʔ na qβaʔ tajwan . koraʔ qani ɣa s~ɕij s~ɕaj pzjaŋ kinβlaq na ħβaŋan keʔ tajwan, laxi βalaj s~ɕʦ~ʨipuq mitaʔ qu jow qani. s~ɕquliuq ka pzjaŋ βalaj βaq kinβaqan kmajal muʦ~ʨi uzi. ijat muʦ~ʨi laxi tqβaq keʔ eɣo, jana s~ɕexu ɣa, aki mβlaq lmŋluŋ keʔ na koka, aki s~ɕon nanuʔ s~ɕiqa tħujaj mʔħβaŋan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan maki te tajwan qani. aki mwaħ s~ɕlaβaŋ ru s~ɕβħujaw mnanak na keʔ, rekis~ɕi, ɣaɣaʔ ru ŋeŋajan na tajwan. lmaɣuʔ s~ɕa kinlokaħ ka mus~ɕaʔ ps~ɕpuŋ te ʦ~ʨinβwanan. mwaħ pʦ~ʨβaq kmajal muʦ~ʨi lozi, jow na pʦ~ʨjoɣun rmuruw keʔ qani ɣa, pzjaŋ βalaj na jow. iniʔ tnaqi mitaʔ qu pinnraw lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ mwaħ ps~ɕjaqiħ βalaj jow na lmuħuw keʔ koka ta qani la. ɣmβaŋ keʔ ɣmβaŋ keʔ: ***/jawaj walis~ɕ "******ms~ɕtβwan*******"
S.FORM: aring rmuruw "2030 rusa' ulah ke' na koka" (2030雙語國家) qu sexu. nyux nha ptnaqun rmuruw qu ke' yung ki ke' ego. ana ga, skahul ta' lmagu' kinlokh musa' pspung te cinbwanan qani ga, iyat nanak rmuruw tqbaq ke' ego qani qu pcyogun ta'. ryax 8 qani ga, 臺灣語文學會splahuy nha' sinbung kisya mwah kmayal nqu " hmtuy yow nqu 2030 rusa' ulah ke' na koka ". lokah balay mplaw kmayal muci, piyux balay ini' btnaq ke' nyux maki te Taywan, yan na ke' na Austronesia , ke' na Plmukan , ke' na qba' Taywan . kora' qani ga siy say pzyang kinblaq na hbangan ke' Taywan, laxi balay scipuq mita' qu yow qani. squliuq ka pzyang balay baq kinbaqan kmayal muci uzi. iyat muci laxi tqbaq ke' ego, yana sexu ga, aki mblaq lmnglung ke' na koka, aki son nanu' siqa thuyay m'hbangan na cinbwanan maki te Taywan qani. aki mwah slabang ru sbhuyaw mnanak na ke', rekisi, gaga' ru ngengayan na Taywan. lmagu' sa kinlokah ka musa' pspung te cinbwanan. mwah pcbaq kmayal muci lozi, yow na pcyogun rmuruw ke' qani ga, pzyang balay na yow. ini' tnaqi mita' qu pinnraw lga, musa' mwah psyaqih balay yow na lmuhuw ke' koka ta qani la. gmbang ke' gmbang ke': 陳麗惠/Yaway Walis "南投縣仁愛鄉Mstbwan部落之地方語音"
S.PHON: ariŋ rmuruw "**** rus~ɕaʔ ulaħ keʔ na koka" (********) qu s~ɕexu. njux nħa ptnaqun rmuruw qu keʔ juŋ ki keʔ eɣo. ana ɣa, s~ɕkaħul taʔ lmaɣuʔ kinlokħ mus~ɕaʔ ps~ɕpuŋ te ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa, ijat nanak rmuruw tqβaq keʔ eɣo qani qu pʦ~ʨjoɣun taʔ. rjax * qani ɣa, ******s~ɕplaħuj nħaʔ s~ɕinβuŋ kis~ɕja mwaħ kmajal nqu " ħmtuj jow nqu **** rus~ɕaʔ ulaħ keʔ na koka ". lokaħ βalaj mplaw kmajal muʦ~ʨi, pijux βalaj iniʔ βtnaq keʔ njux maki te tajwan, jan na keʔ na aus~ɕtrones~ɕia , keʔ na plmukan , keʔ na qβaʔ tajwan . koraʔ qani ɣa s~ɕij s~ɕaj pzjaŋ kinβlaq na ħβaŋan keʔ tajwan, laxi βalaj s~ɕʦ~ʨipuq mitaʔ qu jow qani. s~ɕquliuq ka pzjaŋ βalaj βaq kinβaqan kmajal muʦ~ʨi uzi. ijat muʦ~ʨi laxi tqβaq keʔ eɣo, jana s~ɕexu ɣa, aki mβlaq lmŋluŋ keʔ na koka, aki s~ɕon nanuʔ s~ɕiqa tħujaj mʔħβaŋan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan maki te tajwan qani. aki mwaħ s~ɕlaβaŋ ru s~ɕβħujaw mnanak na keʔ, rekis~ɕi, ɣaɣaʔ ru ŋeŋajan na tajwan. lmaɣuʔ s~ɕa kinlokaħ ka mus~ɕaʔ ps~ɕpuŋ te ʦ~ʨinβwanan. mwaħ pʦ~ʨβaq kmajal muʦ~ʨi lozi, jow na pʦ~ʨjoɣun rmuruw keʔ qani ɣa, pzjaŋ βalaj na jow. iniʔ tnaqi mitaʔ qu pinnraw lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ mwaħ ps~ɕjaqiħ βalaj jow na lmuħuw keʔ koka ta qani la. ɣmβaŋ keʔ ɣmβaŋ keʔ: ***/jawaj walis~ɕ "******ms~ɕtβwan*******"
